examples: He had emerged from being a hesitant and unsure candidate into a fluent debater.
A good debater recognizes that resorting to a tu quoque only weakens one's position in the argument.
The debater refused to cede the point to her opponent.
After this give and take, each debater is allowed to give a closing statement.
An intelligent and able debater he became a minister in the Lord Chancellor's department in 1997.
